'''rachofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squamousness|squamousness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squamousness|squamousness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rachofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræchefeth|ræchefeth]] || [[word:ræchefej|ræchefej]] || [[word:ræchefesh|ræchefesh]] || [[word:ræchefe|ræchefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rachochofoth|rachochofoth]] || [[word:rachochofoj|rachochofoj]] || [[word:rachochofosh|rachochofosh]] || [[word:rachochofo|rachochofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rachofoth|rachofoth]] || [[word:rachofoj|rachofoj]] || [[word:rachofosh|rachofosh]] || [[word:rachofo|rachofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rachoffoth|rachoffoth]] || [[word:rachoffoj|rachoffoj]] || [[word:rachoffosh|rachoffosh]] || [[word:rachoffof|rachoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rachofotho|rachofotho]] || [[word:rachofojo|rachofojo]] || [[word:rachofosho|rachofosho]] || [[word:rachofoko|rachofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rachofoth|rachofoth]] || [[word:rachofoj|rachofoj]] || [[word:rachofosh|rachofosh]] || [[word:rachofo|rachofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rachofothol|rachofothol]] || [[word:rachofojol|rachofojol]] || [[word:rachofoshol|rachofoshol]] || [[word:rachofokol|rachofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rachofothotho|rachofothotho]] || [[word:rachofojojo|rachofojojo]] || [[word:rachofoshosho|rachofoshosho]] || [[word:rachofoko|rachofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rachofothon|rachofothon]] || [[word:rachofojon|rachofojon]] || [[word:rachofoshon|rachofoshon]] || [[word:rachofokon|rachofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rachofothoro|rachofothoro]] || [[word:rachofojoro|rachofojoro]] || [[word:rachofoshoro|rachofoshoro]] || [[word:rachofokoro|rachofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
